item.title: Small Tuesday Dump <3
item.description:
Almost all of them are stolen, forgive me
Thats 104 victims, this kid is going places
Seagulls are the coolest assholes
Looks like a lie that went too far
Okay, this one isnt stolen, I edited it for... reasons.
They flush
Idk why but this is the funniest thing Ive seen all year <3
Goals
Brayden you idiot
I dont even know what to say, i just keep cracking up
Honestly, you can replace the black male with alt/goth girl and it works just the same
The cross around his neck sells it
Mii looks like she wants to tell you a rly funny joke but had to stop laughing first

item.title: GovBrief Today #214
item.description: Today’s events represent a coordinated, multi-front assault. We're forced to watch a spectacle of shameless grift, from the massive crypto payday for the Trump and Witkoff families guaranteed by a self-dealing arrangement to the nation's highest honor given to Rudy Giuliani. The noise covers for the quiet sabotage of our ability to function. They are gutting public health and scrapping climate data. Giuliani is the perfect symbol of this cynical game. He’s a COVID denier who took the special care denied to others, now rewarded for helping dismantle the very systems meant to protect us all. He was disbarred for lying about the 2020 election results, but he probably won't mind as he receives the Medal of Freedom. Congress is back in session this week. Tell your representatives to do their job and stop the rot. Don’t leave truth to the algorithm. Our free and private nightly email arms you with images, data, and quotes so you can see it all for yourself. Add your email at govbrief dot today or on Substack at Gov Brief Today. #GovBriefToday #Resist Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com [1] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-family-profits-crypto [2] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-housing-emergency-considered [3] https://go.govbrief.today/giuliani-medal-freedom [4] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-asylum-plan-homeless [5] https://go.govbrief.today/former-cdc-directors-warn [6] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-covid-demand-pharma [7] https://go.govbrief.today/climate-satellite-research-halt [8] https://go.govbrief.today/workers-vs-billionaires-protests [9] https://go.govbrief.today/epstein-files-khanna-massie
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: Veteran Speaks Out Against The Imperial Boomerang
item.description: Sauce: https://www.youtube.com/shorts/nfKUf-rebaI More Info: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Imperial_boomerang Whens the last time Americans were actually free? What have either political party done to restrain the police and surveillance state? Do you feel comfortable with Trump's fascist feds knowing your political beliefs with the tools Democrats helped build to watch you and your neighbors? Or "interpreting" your political beliefs and actions with "AI"? Or sending you to even MORE bullshit forever-wars that make the US and the rest of the world less safe to benefit oil companies and American/ Western hegemony?
item.dc:creator: Decitron

item.title: And?
item.description: Edit: thanks for the upvotes my dudes. I screwed up when I made this post and neglected to track the source of this claim. Turns out it’s one dude, he wrote an article based on the initial surveys and feedback on AI deployment. https://www.cio.com/article/4022953/31-of-employees-are-sabotaging-your-gen-ai-strategy.html Bonus at the end of the article: “This is luddite history revisited. In 1811, the Luddites smashed textile machines to keep their jobs. Today, it’s Slack sabotage and whispered prompt jailbreaking, etc. Human nature hasn’t changed, but the tools have,” Nyman says. “If your company tells people they’re your greatest asset and then replaces them with an LLM, well, don’t be shocked when they pull the plug or feed the model garbage data. If the AI transformation rollout comes with a whiff of callous ‘adapt or die’ arrogance from the C-suite, there will be rebellion Tagging @metroid2 Original post: I fucking hate hate HATE the sycophantic idiots who keep framing this as an employee issue or a user issue. 90% of us barely have a handle on what it can actually do, most of the team is just worried about their job being taken away in the future.
item.dc:creator: DownvotesStarWars

item.title: Ting Ling and his amazing weird bicycles
item.description: UPDATE: Sorry, It's "Ling Ting!" not Ting Ling. Whoops. It's hard to find out much about this guy... who appears to be named Ling Ting, from China. He has such a hilariously whimsical and imaginative energy, channeled into his bizarre but entertaining bicycle collection.
item.dc:creator: cytherians

item.title: Stuff and things

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1462 (rave quoll)
item.description:
Let's get this bread. May just open all future meme dumps with this gif. Thoughts? Thanks to... who created this again? I'm blanking.
They have a rave quoll.
Nervous as fuck about new job starting today.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "what doing?" ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 3) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 4) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride 5) Since multiple people have requested this over the last two weeks or so, my ko-fi is: https://ko-fi.com/codyandpippin
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: Today is the day! Story's taken her preop medicine, expressed her frustration over the absence of her food dish all night, and is about to be a lot less happy with me in an hour.
